message:
test(tx): add compensation, contract state, and observability proptest invariants (ft-1i2ge.8)

Add 5 proptest invariant tests for the tx execution engine:

- Compensation: auto_compensate triggers compensation on commit failures;
  disabled auto_compensate prevents compensation
- Contract mutation: contract lifecycle_state and outcome reflect
  final execution state; failure injection prevents Committed outcome
- Observability: successful execution emits PrepareStarted,
  PrepareCompleted, CommitStarted, CommitCompleted events

Total proptest_tx_execution tests: 18 (was 13).

Build: --no-default-features --features subprocess-bridge
All 18 pass (0.08s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
